examples: It is the westernmost city in China. It's also an oasis with markets.
This astronaut photograph features Mataiva atoll, the westernmost atoll of the Tuamotu chain.
Portugal and Spain share the land on the westernmost point of Europe, called the Iberian peninsula.
Located at Africa's westernmost tip, it is a funnel towards Europe for Latin American cocaine.
Belarus's two westernmost provinces, once part of Poland, might demand a plebiscite.
